overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district. The player crosses a street and walks along wet sidewalks past the 'Dewdrop Inn' and various futuristic storefronts with vibrant holographic advertisements.

events.description: finishes crossing the street and steps onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow-striped crosswalk toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking across the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: large triangular neon sign for the Dewdrop Inn bar with green and yellow lighting
wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
tall buildings covered with holographic advertisements and glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit intersection at night, with the camera crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The Dewdrop Inn sign glows prominently on the right while holographic billboards illuminate the distant buildings. A woman in a red dress crosses paths with the camera as it approaches the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk in front of the Dewdrop Inn

events.description: approaching the covered underpass entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past the Dewdrop Inn entrance

entered.detail: tall modern street light illuminating the wet sidewalk
dark tunnel entrance under the building overpass with neon lighting inside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk with the Dewdrop Inn now closer on the right. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights overhead. The camera approaches a dark underpass entrance in the distance while passing street lamps and building columns.

events.description: exiting the underpass into the open street with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass with neon lights reflecting off wet surfaces

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with embedded neon strip lighting
fast food restaurant with bright orange and green neon signage

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a covered underpass with concrete walls and ceiling illuminated by embedded neon lights. The environment shifts from open sky to sheltered walkway. Upon exiting, a Burrito shop with bright signage becomes visible on the right as the scene opens up again.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and vending machines

events.description: slight turn to navigate around pedestrians on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various shops and vending machines

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the camera

entered.detail: row of automated vending machines with glowing blue and red displays
large floating holographic advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling commercial street lined with vending machines and neon-lit storefronts. The Burrito shop remains visible further back on the right while new holographic advertisements appear in the distance. The sidewalk becomes more crowded with pedestrians as the camera moves toward a busy intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched commercial district that transitions from an open intersection into a sheltered underpass and back into a bustling street. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath glowing holographic billboards, passing a woman in a red dress as the camera approaches the vibrant signage of the Dewdrop Inn. As the camera moves along the wet concrete sidewalk, the open night sky is replaced by the oppressive concrete walls of a covered underpass illuminated by embedded neon strips. The scene then opens up again upon exiting the tunnel, revealing a brightly lit burrito shop on the right. Finally, the camera advances down a crowded commercial thoroughfare lined with vending machines and holographic advertisements, moving toward a busy intersection ahead.
